docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-28-2017, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT STAPLES
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PURSUANT TO THE ORDER SIGNED ON 12/07/2021 BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PER REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY, REPRESENTED BY AHMET PASCI, PRESIDENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHAEL MAU; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF EXPRESS PARKING, INC.
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 12/7/2021 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF EXPRESS PARKING, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT STAPLES
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY EXPRESS PARKING, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT STAPLES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-15-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
